head

The initial batch contains 250 brochures, and printing three times that amount adds 750 more, resulting in a total of 1000 brochures distributed at the fair. Since every single brochure highlights 5 distinct potential applications, multiplying the total brochure count by 5 yields 5000 highlighted applications in all. This number demonstrates the immense potential of dark matter research for future innovation and scientific advancement.
